summary: Finished enough ftdrawcommon work to move src/melee/ft/ftdrawcommon.c from NonMatching to Matching. The core source change introduced a static inline helper, ftDrawCommon_8008051C_inline, that reproduces the matrix setup done by ftDrawCommon_8008051C using caller-provided stack locals, then used it inside the large ftDrawCommon_800805C8 and ftDrawCommon_80080C28 paths to control stack layout/register behavior. The PR also corrected symbols.txt entries, mostly demoting compiler-generated local constants/strings from broad ftDrawCommon_/it_ labels to local @NNN labels and fixing ftDrawCommon_804D8370 size from 0x8 to 0x4. The body notes that ftDrawCommon_800805C8 was 'one tiny regswap away' but too large for the permuter to handle well.

key_files.role: Main source changes: added ftDrawCommon_8008051C_inline and adjusted local declarations/calls in ftDrawCommon_800805C8 and ftDrawCommon_80080C28 for matching.
Changed melee/ft/ftdrawcommon.c from Object(NonMatching, ...) to Object(Matching, ...).
Updated symbol names/scopes/sizes for local constants and strings related to ftdrawcommon and item data.

what_changed: Added static inline MtxPtr ftDrawCommon_8008051C_inline(HSD_GObj* gobj, Vec3* sp54, Vec3* v, Mtx sp18, Mtx sp70), which zeroes two Vec3s, calls ftLib_80087074, obtains HSD_CObjGetCurrent()->view_mtx, builds an identity/translation matrix with mtx_thing_2, concatenates it with PSMTXConcat, and returns sp70 or NULL.
In ftDrawCommon_800805C8, introduced explicit stack locals Mtx sp78, Mtx sp18, Vec3 sp54, Vec3 v, and adjusted padding from PAD_STACK(0x18) to PAD_STACK(12).
In ftDrawCommon_800805C8, replaced the call mtx = ftDrawCommon_8008051C(gobj, sp78) with ftDrawCommon_8008051C_inline(gobj, &sp54, &v, sp18, sp78).
In ftDrawCommon_80080C28, added Mtx sp18, Vec3 sp54, and Vec3 v locals and replaced the ftDrawCommon_8008051C call with the new inline helper.
Removed an explicit phi_r28 = NULL assignment before the helper call in ftDrawCommon_80080C28, likely because the inline helper and local layout made it unnecessary for matching.
Updated configure.py so melee/ft/ftdrawcommon.c is now built as Matching instead of NonMatching.

Renamed several symbols in config/GALE01/symbols.txt from guessed global/module-prefixed names to local @NNN compiler labels, including ftDrawCommon_803C0EB0 to @463, ftDrawCommon_804D3A94 to @461, ftDrawCommon_804D3A9C to @462, and several it_* constants to @NNN labels.
Corrected ftDrawCommon_804D8370 in symbols.txt from size 0x8 to size 0x4.
smart_moves: Used an inline clone of a small helper rather than relying on a normal function call, giving the compiler more similar code shape inside the large draw routines and helping resolve the reported near-match/regswap issue.
Passed stack locals into the inline helper explicitly instead of declaring them inside the helper, preserving caller stack-slot names and layout such as sp54, sp18, and sp78/sp70.
Tuned local declaration order and PAD_STACK sizes around the large ftDrawCommon_800805C8 function, a common decomp matching lever when only register allocation or stack layout remains off.

Promoted the object to Matching only after source and symbol map corrections were made together, avoiding a stale config state where the code appears matching but symbols still imply wrong ownership/scope.
Converted anonymous local constants/strings to @NNN labels where evidence indicated they were compiler-generated locals, reducing misleading global/module-prefixed names in the symbol map.
decomp_lessons: For huge functions where the permuter struggles, isolating a repeated helper body as a static inline can be more practical than searching permutations over the whole function.
Inlining a known helper manually can fix small register allocation differences while keeping behavior equivalent, especially when matrix setup code needs caller-owned stack temporaries.
Stack local ordering matters: moving Mtx and Vec3 declarations out of inner scopes and adjusting PAD_STACK can be the difference between nonmatching and matching.
Do not preserve guessed names for local string/float/double constants once evidence shows they are anonymous local labels; symbols.txt should reflect @NNN local labels and accurate scope.
Symbol size corrections matter for matching metadata and future analysis; ftDrawCommon_804D8370 being 0x4 rather than 0x8 is a concrete example.
When a function is described as one regswap away, review stack locals, inlining, and call boundaries before relying on brute-force permutation.
naming_conventions: Module functions use the ftDrawCommon_800xxxxx naming pattern, e.g. ftDrawCommon_8008051C, ftDrawCommon_800805C8, and ftDrawCommon_80080C28.
The added helper was named ftDrawCommon_8008051C_inline, explicitly tying it to the existing function whose body/behavior it duplicates inline.
Compiler-generated local symbols in symbols.txt use @NNN names with scope:local, rather than guessed module/global names such as ftDrawCommon_803C0EB0 or it_804DCCB0.
Stack-local placeholder names in the source preserve decomp stack offset information, such as spAC, spA8, sp78, sp70, sp54, sp18, and v.
Matrix pointer and vector types are named with project conventions such as MtxPtr, Mtx, Vec3, HSD_GObj, HSD_CObj, and HSD_JObj.
assembly_or_matching_tactics: Changed ftdrawcommon.c from NonMatching to Matching in configure.py.
Used a static inline helper to reproduce ftDrawCommon_8008051C behavior at call sites in ftDrawCommon_800805C8 and ftDrawCommon_80080C28.
Controlled stack layout by introducing caller-level Mtx and Vec3 temporaries and passing them by pointer/value to the inline helper.
Adjusted PAD_STACK in ftDrawCommon_800805C8 from 0x18 to 12 and kept PAD_STACK(4) in ftDrawCommon_80080C28 while changing surrounding locals.
Moved Mtx sp78 out of an inner block in ftDrawCommon_800805C8 so it participates in the full function's stack frame.
Removed an unnecessary phi_r28 initialization in ftDrawCommon_80080C28 after restructuring the helper call.
Matched local constant metadata by changing symbols from global/module-prefixed names to local @NNN labels and correcting a .sdata2 object size.
follow_up_queries: Find later PRs touching ftDrawCommon_800805C8 for final naming, cleanup, or removal of placeholder locals.
Search for other PRs that used static inline wrappers to solve regswap issues in large fighter functions.
Audit symbols.txt entries near ftDrawCommon_804D8370 and adjacent @252/@253 labels for whether constants were later typed or named.
Look for discussion or commits explaining why ftDrawCommon_8008051C_inline was preferred over calling ftDrawCommon_8008051C directly.
